sn38.7:1.1: "Friend Sāriputta, it is said, ‘feeling, feeling.’ What now is feeling?"
sn38.7:1.2: "There are, friend, these three feelings: pleasant feeling, painful feeling, neither-painful-nor-pleasant feeling. These are the three feelings."
sn38.7:1.3: "But, friend, is there a path, is there a way for the full understanding of these three feelings?"
sn38.7:1.4: "There is a path, friend, there is a way … this Noble Eightfold Path … ." sn.iv.256
